name: Moodboard
description: Clic droit sur n'importe quelle image pour l'ajouter directement à un board Moodboard.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https: https://*.firebasedatabase.app wss://*.firebasedatabase.app https://*.googleapis.com https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com https://securetoken.googleapis.com wss://*.firebaseio.com https://*.firebaseio.com https://*.googleusercontent.com https://*.gstatic.com;
